claude-api.name: claude-api
claude-api.description: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Includes prompt caching, tool use, streaming, batches, files, citations, memory, and model migration guidance.
claude-api.author: Anthropic

frontend-design.name: frontend-design
frontend-design.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality for pages, components, dashboards, HTML/CSS layouts, and web UI polish.
frontend-design.author: Anthropic

mcp-builder.name: mcp-builder
mcp-builder.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers that integrate external APIs or services through well-designed tools in Python or Node/TypeScript.
mcp-builder.author: Anthropic

skill-creator.name: skill-creator
skill-creator.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, run evaluations, benchmark performance, and optimize skill descriptions for better triggering accuracy.
skill-creator.author: Anthropic

webapp-testing.name: webapp-testing
webapp-testing.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright, including frontend verification, UI debugging, screenshots, and browser logs.
webapp-testing.author: Anthropic
